question: Let X and Y be independent random variables with X ~ Poisson(λ) and Y ~ Poisson(μ). Given that X + Y = n, the conditional distribution of X belongs to which family?
equation: P(X = k \mid X + Y = n), \quad k = 0, 1, \ldots, n
equation_note: X + Y \sim \text{Poisson}(\lambda + \mu) by the additive property
